slide1.title: We'll nudge you through the day.
slide1.body: The right words at the right moment — that's all.

slide2.title: For everyone about to give up.
slide2.body: These words aren't for you. They're for the you about to quit.

slide3.title: We need notification access.
slide3.body: We won't bother you. We'll just remind you.

preferences.title: What are you looking for?

home.patience: The next one comes when it's time. Be patient.
